## What does this change?

Describe the scope and intent of the pull request.

## Related issue

Closes # (if applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / style
- [ ] Build / CI

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change.

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] No regression in existing behaviour

## Privacy / security

Does this change affect how user data, location, or personal information is handled?

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing project style
- [ ] Documentation reflects the changes
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and conventional
